query:
SELECT as2.id, as2.skill_id, as2.installed_slot, as2.awake_tier, gsc.name, gsc.category, gsc.wuxing
FROM agent_skills as2
LEFT JOIN game_skill_catalog gsc ON as2.skill_id = gsc.skill_id
WHERE as2.agent_id = (SELECT id FROM game_agents WHERE user_id = '1' LIMIT 1)
ORDER BY as2.skill_id;
command:
